description: Item / material database — curated authoritative records with categories and reverse drop-source index (drop_stages populated by build_drop_index.py). Distinct from raw extraction in projects/wiki/data/processed/item_stories.json. Currently empty stub; to be populated in Phase 3 with categories from item_stories.json/by_category and the 375 known item entries.

weapons.name: 武器
weapons.description: Equipment held by awakeners that primarily affect attack output.

artifacts.name: 神器
artifacts.description: Trinket-class accessories. Detailed entries live in trinkets.json; this category is for cross-listing only.

skills.name: 技能素材
skills.description: Materials used to upgrade awakener skills.

materials.name: 通用材料
materials.description: Common upgrade materials gathered from stages and events.

other.name: 其他
other.description: Currencies, story items, and miscellaneous entries.
